name: RDP Lateral Movement
description: Detects RDP connections between internal systems indicating lateral movement
query:
// RDP Lateral Movement
// Internal RDP connections
events from authentication
where event_type = "rdp_connection" or service = "rdp"
  and (source_ip starts_with "10." or source_ip starts_with "192.168." or source_ip starts_with "172.")
  and (destination_ip starts_with "10." or destination_ip starts_with "192.168." or destination_ip starts_with "172.")
group by source_ip, destination_ip, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
